generated_oml:
import "http://example.org/dtdf/vocab" as DTDFVocab

instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor collecting point cloud data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera collecting depth data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance DepthCameraDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX, IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data collected from Hokuyo UST-10LX sensor",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth data from Intel Deepsense D435i camera",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed and steering angle data",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from processed sensor data"
]

instance ACC : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control model for vehicle control functions"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks through user interface"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saves vehicle state and object track data to SQL database",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates analytical reports from stored data",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OffloadLeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloads lead vehicle detection computation to cloud infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OffloadSpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloads speed calculation based on distance to cloud infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OffloadActuationCommands : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Offloads actuation commands for vehicle control to cloud infrastructure",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remotely enables Adaptive Cruise Control system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remotely disables Adaptive Cruise Control system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets desired speed for ACC system via remote UI",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking command via remote UI",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks via UI data saving and report generation",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC's lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation commands to cloud infrastructure to alleviate on-board ECU constraints",
    DTDFVocab:provides OffloadLeadVehicleDetection, OffloadSpeedCalculation, OffloadActuationCommands
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC, desired speed setting, and emergency braking commands through UI",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR and depth data into object tracks",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Generates analytical reports from stored data",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured storage of object tracks and ego vehicle state data",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware-accelerated processing",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical entity representing the real-world vehicle"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital representation of the physical vehicle"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User entity for monitoring and control via UI"
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity responsible for collecting physical sensor data"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for point cloud clustering and tracking"
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for data pre-processing"
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for message type alignment and unit conversion"
]

instance UserInterfaceFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface Functional Entity"
]

instance UI3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance UIControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance ActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component converting desired speed into motor voltage commands and managing motor and steering servo operations"
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor speed regulation"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for vehicle steering control"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle with ACC system",
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, HokuyoUST10LX, IntelDeepsenseD435i, VedderElectronicSpeedController, Motor, SteeringServo, DataCollectingFE, PointCloudClusteringTrackingFE, DataPreProcessingFE, DataTranslationFE, UserInterfaceFE, UI3DVisualization, UIControlPanel, ActuationComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Motor Actuation and Steering Servo Actuation are generated by the Controlling FE and processed through Data Translation. Control signals are transmitted via Wi-Fi using UDP protocol to physical actuators. The Control Panel User Interface FE provides the interface for inputting control commands. Specific command formats, validation, authentication, and feedback mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading between devices, which is less stringent than the stricter-than-100 ms requirements of safety-critical vehicular standards due to hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. The Physical Twin Entity departs from the standard by hosting general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) and is deployed on different hardware than the Digital Twin and User Entities, with all entities coordinated via 100 ms clock synchronization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs via ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Data Translation handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion for all data streams. Bandwidth, latency, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Complies with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) is referenced as an example for implementing data collection and device control functional entities."
]
